description: Analyze the allosteric inhibition of HIV-1 Reverse Transcriptase using crystal structure PDB:1VRT (bound to nevirapine). Identify the p66 and p51 subunits, measure the spatial distance between the allosteric inhibitor nevirapine (NVP) and the polymerase active site catalytic triad (Asp110, Asp185, Asp186), and identify the residues forming the NNRTI binding pocket. Create a publication-quality figure of the heterodimer with the active site and ligand highlighted, saved to ~/PyMOL_Data/images/rt_allostery.png. Write a structural analysis report to ~/PyMOL_Data/rt_allostery_report.txt containing the measured distance (in Angstroms) between the NVP ligand and the active site triad, confirmation of the subunit chain IDs, and a list of at least 5 specific residues that line the NVP binding pocket.
